data.title: The Vitamin Shoppe launches AG1 supplement in over 640 stores, offering Daily Health Drink and expert guidance.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, The Vitamin Shoppe®, based in Secaucus, N.J., was announced as AG1's primary national specialty retail partner. This partnership provides convenient access to AG1's popular Daily Health Drink, a leading product in its category. Alongside this beverage, customers can benefit from expert nutrition advice at The Vitamin Shoppe®.

data.title: Global Partners LP declares $0.59375 cash distribution per Series B Preferred Unit ($2.375 annually) for Nov 15, 2025 - Feb 14, 2026. Payable on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: Global Partners LP (NYSE: GLP) based in Waltham, Mass declared a quarterly cash distribution of $0.59375 per unit ($2.375 annually) for the Partnership's 9.50% fixed-rate Series B preferred units. This distribution covers the period from November 15, 2025 to February 14, 2026. The Board of Directors at Global GP LLC, the Partnership's general partner, approved this payment which is set to be distributed to Series B preferred unitholders on February 17, 2026.
CUBAN PRESIDENT MIGUEL DIAZ CANEL SAYS THERE ARE NO CONVERSATIONS WITH THE U.S. GOVERNMENT, EXCEPT FOR TECHNICAL CONTACTS IN THE MIGRATION FIELD
HighCo reports changes in shareholding with 15% increase in ownership by a major investor.

data.title: Bascom Arizona Ventures buys 304-unit Tucson property for $53.4 million.
data.description: In Tucson, Arizona, on January 12, 2026, Bascom Arizona Ventures, LLC (BAZV), a part of the private equity firm The Bascom Group, LLC, based in Irvine, California, purchased the Retreat at Speedway. This multifamily property consists of 304 units and was acquired for $53.4 million.

data.title: Crave Retail displays AI-powered fitting room & in-store platform at NRF 2026 with Zebra's tech, boosting sales.
data.description: Crave Retail is set to introduce its innovative AI-driven smart fitting room and in-store engagement technology, using Zebra's retail displays, mobile devices, and RFID solutions. This collaboration aims to enhance the shopping experience for customers and provide valuable real-time insights for retailers. This advanced system will enable businesses to track and optimize various shopper interactions, leading to higher conversion rates and improved merchandise management.

data.title: Chicago's Rothschild Wealth Partners acquires Windgate Wealth Management with over $200 million in assets.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Rothschild Wealth Partners™, a Registered Investment Advisor in Chicago, has successfully purchased Windgate Wealth Management, an independent advisory firm also located in Chicago. Windgate Wealth Management oversees a substantial portfolio of over $200 million in client assets. Established in 1990, this acquisition marks a significant milestone for Rothschild Wealth Partners™ as they continue to expand their presence in the financial advisory sector.

data.title: Trust & Will launches platform for estate planning attorneys to grow their practices, announced on Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: Trust & Will has unveiled Trust & Will for Attorneys, an AI-driven platform designed to assist estate planning lawyers in expanding their practices and enhancing efficiency. This announcement was made on January 12, 2026, in San Diego. As a prominent player in online estate planning, Trust & Will's latest offering aims to empower attorneys in this field.

data.title: Risk & Insurance Education Alliance sponsors InsHER Podcast, celebrating women in insurance industry. Hosted by Megan Bell.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on January 12, 2026, The Risk & Insurance Education Alliance has confirmed its position as the inaugural sponsor of the InsHER Podcast. This innovative podcast is dedicated to recognizing and empowering women who are making significant contributions to the insurance sector. The show is hosted by Megan Bell...

data.title: Standard Chartered to launch crypto brokerage platform, amends ETH forecast as banks bolster digital asset offerings.
data.description: Reportedly, Standard Chartered is considering launching a cryptocurrency prime brokerage platform, in response to the growing trend of banks expanding their services to include digital assets. This move comes as more traditional financial institutions are entering the crypto space to capitalize on its rapid growth. As the value of the global cryptocurrency market approaches $2 trillion, banks are seeking ways to cater to the increasing demand for crypto-related services and investment opportunities. Standard Chartered's decision to explore a crypto prime brokerage platform reflects the shifting landscape of the financial industry towards digital assets.

data.title: Legion introduces 90+ new features to improve workforce management, revolutionizing labor decisions.
data.description: Legion Technologies, based in Redwood City, California, has recently unveiled over 90 cutting-edge innovations aimed at revolutionizing the process of making and implementing labor decisions on a large scale.

data.title: Schrödinger (Nasdaq: SDGR) updates on 2025 progress and outlines 2026 strategic priorities, focusing on physics+AI platform.
data.description: In New York, Schrödinger, Inc. (Nasdaq: SDGR) shared its achievements and outlined plans for 2026. The company remains dedicated to enhancing its physics+AI computational platform and establishing itself as a key player in computational molecular research worldwide. Through leveraging the 'physics+AI' approach in 2025, Schrödinger addressed data limitations and expedited the identification of unique molecules. This strategic focus has enabled the company to make significant progress.

data.title: ATEC America deploys E3 retail cash solution with EZcams software, increasing ROI and decreasing manual cash management time. Stores benefit.
data.description: In the past year, ATEC America has rolled out the advanced E3 Enterprise Cash Manager at numerous retail sites alongside their EZcams software. The successful implementation of this system has led to a notable boost in ROI and a reduction in employee hours spent on manual cash handling. Particularly effective in convenience stores, the E3 has proven its value in high-traffic, high-volume cash settings. A significant travel plaza company has also adopted this solution, further demonstrating its efficacy.

data.title: Prometheum appoints four new advisors to advance blockchain-based securities, totaling five advisors including Dr. Arthur Laffer.
data.description: In New York, Prometheum Inc., a market infrastructure provider for blockchain-based securities, has appointed four new advisors to its advisory committee. The new advisors are Nobel Laureate Dr. Michael Spence, Dr. Jimmie Lenz, Donald H. Wilson, and Jeff Mehan. They will be joining senior strategic advisor Dr. Arthur Laffer in the company's mission to modernize U.S. capital markets by integrating blockchain-based securities with federal regulation. This move highlights Prometheum's commitment to innovation and growth in the industry.

data.title: Katie Foote named Manhattan Associates Chief Marketing Officer.
data.description: Yesterday, a report was released stating that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.5% in 2021 and 4.2% in 2022. This represents an upward revision of 0.3% and 0.4% respectively compared to previous estimates. The report highlighted that the recovery is expected to be uneven across countries, with advanced economies rebounding faster than emerging markets. It also mentioned that vaccination efforts and fiscal support packages have been key drivers of economic improvement. Additionally, the report emphasized the importance of continued policy support to ensure a smooth and sustainable recovery.

data.title: Sleep Number launches ComfortMode mattress under $1,600, offering top comfort without app, connectivity.
data.description: In Minneapolis today, Sleep Number Corporation (Nasdaq: SNBR) unveiled ComfortMode, its latest product billed as the most comfortable mattress priced under $1,600. This innovative offering does not rely on an app or connectivity for operation, boasting simplicity while still providing features like firmness adjustability and temperature balancing benefits that Sleep Number is known for. Along with ComfortMode, Sleep Number is introducing a new adjustable base to complement the mattress. The company is expanding its line with these additions to cater to consumers seeking a high level of comfort at an affordable price point.

data.title: Tempus & NYU Langone Health team up to enhance cancer care through advanced profiling and data insights.
data.description: In Chicago, Tempus, a key player in artificial intelligence and precision medicine, has partnered with NYU Langone Health in a significant collaboration to revolutionize cancer care. The multi-year strategic alliance is focused on leveraging advanced molecular profiling and data-driven insights to enhance cancer treatment. This partnership will bolster NYU Langone Health's Center for Molecular Oncology at the Laura and Isaac Perlmutter Cancer Center, a pioneering initiative addressing various types of cancers with cutting-edge technologies. This collaboration aims to bring about groundbreaking advancements in cancer care by combining expertise and resources from both organizations.

data.title: Bojangles opens in Brooklyn, NY at 5910 Church Ave, offering iconic chicken & biscuits. Open 24 hours, drive-thru all day.
data.description: Bojangles, the renowned chain known for its famous chicken, biscuits, and breakfast options, has launched its first location in New York. Situated at 5910 Church Ave. in Brooklyn, the restaurant welcomed its doors to customers today at 5 a.m. It will remain open 24 hours, with the dining area shutting at midnight while the drive-thru stays operational throughout. This opening signals a fresh chapter for Bojangles as it expands its presence and offerings, amid a period of notable development for the brand.

data.title: Amprius Technologies finished its At-The-Market Equity Offering Program, selling all authorized shares.
data.description: Amprius Technologies, Inc., based in Fremont, California, a frontrunner in advanced lithium-ion batteries utilizing the Silicon Anode Platform, revealed the successful closure of all sales under its at-the-market equity offering program. The program, initiated on October 2, 2023, allowed the Company to offer and vend shares of its common stock, each with a par value of $0.0001. Amprius, trading on NYSE under the symbol AMPX, completed this offering after receiving authorization in 2023.

data.title: The ONE Group reports preliminary Q4 and full-year 2025 sales results.Sales ended Dec 28, 2025.Participating in the 28th Annual ICR Conference.
data.description: In Denver today, The ONE Group Hospitality, Inc. (NASDAQ: STKS) disclosed early sales figures for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 28, 2025. The company is set to attend the 28th Annual ICR Conference. The anticipated sales for Q4 and FY 2025 are management estimates and are as follows.
